emails.subject: ASAP Signature required
emails.body: ASAP Signature required Drew is rounding up all parties to sign the document, Consent of Directors regarding Northern transaction in Stan's office tomorrow morning. Teresa Callahan called on behalf of Drew Fossum and asked if you had a fax number for tomorrow morning, time undetermined as they want to fax to you for signature. Please advise a fax number. Sorry to interrupt your family trip. Thanks.

emails.subject: Re: ASAP Signature required
emails.body: Re: ASAP Signature required E mail the consent to me. I'll sign it in counterpart, then I'll find a fax somewhere and fax it back to you. E mail me at tcsjws@aol.com. Call me to give me a heads up. Dan Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: ASAP Signature required
emails.body: RE: ASAP Signature required Danny: I have your request in to Teresa to email document. Reminder that I have blood test at 7:30 and will be at the office asap. Audrey is covering phones and is updated on the situation. To: Armstrong, Julie
